message:
feat(workflows): tick 185 record_workflow_terminal_action cx-threaded across 14 call sites (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Eighth tick of the workflows/runner.rs strangler-fig. Migrates
the workflow terminal-action audit write — called on every
workflow exit path (success, error, abort, approval-required,
policy-denied).

New helpers in workflows/engine.rs:
- `record_workflow_terminal_action_with_cx` — routes both inner
  writes (record_workflow_action + upsert_action_undo_redacted)
  through their cx-first siblings. Preserves the legacy
  "fire-and-forget on error" contract — every audit/undo failure
  is warn-and-continue.
- `record_workflow_terminal_action_maybe_cx` dispatcher — takes
  `Option<&Cx>`.

Call-site migrations in run_workflow_inner (14 sites):
- L603, L896, L948, L1001, L1056, L1109, L1149, L1221, L1355,
  L1419, L1492, L1549, L1604 — all 13 _maybe_cx
- L664 (tick 181 per-step cancel seam, inside Some(cx) arm) —
  _with_cx direct (cx is &Cx in scope)

All 14 terminal-audit sites now thread cx through the audit +
undo writes when cx is Some.

Legacy `record_workflow_terminal_action` preserved for ambient-cx
callers and the dispatcher fallback.

Verified via fork bypass: 31/31 workflows::runner:: tests pass.

Cancellation coverage status for run_workflow_with_cx:
- ✅ Pre-flight checkpoint (tick 178)
- ✅ Startup handshake storage (tick 180, 4 sites)
- ✅ Per-step cancel seam + cleanup (tick 181)
- ✅ Per-step progress write (tick 182, 4 sites)
- ✅ fail_execution (tick 183, 7 sites)
- ✅ set_execution_waiting + complete_execution +
  mark_trigger_event_handled (tick 184, 12 sites)
- ✅ record_workflow_terminal_action (tick 185, 14 sites) —
  this tick

Remaining not-yet-threaded:
- `check_step_idempotency` (1 site at L691) — in plan_helpers.rs,
  probably a natural tick-186 target.
- Per-step `step.execute(&mut ctx).await` — requires threading
  cx into the Step trait which is more invasive.
- 2 legacy callers of `run_workflow` (`run` + `resume_incomplete`) —
  cross-crate signature changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1173,6 +1173,126 @@ pub(super) async fn record_workflow_terminal_action(
     }
 }
 
+/// ft-xbnl0.2.3 Cx-first sibling of [`record_workflow_terminal_action`].
+///
+/// Tick 185: routes both inner writes (record_workflow_action +
+/// storage.upsert_action_undo_redacted) through their cx-first
+/// siblings. Preserves the "fire-and-forget on error" contract
+/// that matches the legacy helper — every audit/undo failure
+/// is warn-and-continue, not fail-fast.
+#[cfg(feature = "asupersync-runtime")]
+#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
+pub(super) async fn record_workflow_terminal_action_with_cx(
+    cx: &crate::cx::Cx,
+    storage: &crate::storage::StorageHandle,
+    workflow_name: &str,
+    execution_id: &str,
+    pane_id: u64,
+    action_kind: &str,
+    result: &str,
+    reason: Option<&str>,
+    step_index: Option<usize>,
+    steps_executed: Option<usize>,
+    start_action_id: Option<i64>,
+) {
+    let summary = serde_json::json!({
+        "workflow_name": workflow_name,
+        "execution_id": execution_id,
+        "reason": reason,
+        "step_index": step_index,
+        "steps_executed": steps_executed,
+        "parent_action_id": start_action_id,
+    });
+    let summary = serde_json::to_string(&summary)
+        .inspect_err(
+            |e| tracing::warn!(error = %e, "workflow terminal summary serialization failed"),
+        )
+        .ok();
+    let _ = record_workflow_action_with_cx(
+        cx,
+        storage,
+        action_kind,
+        execution_id,
+        pane_id,
+        workflow_name,
+        summary,
+        result,
+        reason.map(str::to_string),
+    )
+    .await;
+
+    if let Some(start_action_id) = start_action_id {
+        let undo = crate::storage::ActionUndoRecord {
+            audit_action_id: start_action_id,
+            undoable: false,
+            undo_strategy: "workflow_abort".to_string(),
+            undo_hint: Some("workflow no longer running".to_string()),
+            undo_payload: None,
+            undone_at: None,
+            undone_by: None,
+        };
+        if let Err(e) = storage.upsert_action_undo_redacted_with_cx(cx, undo).await {
+            tracing::warn!(
+                execution_id,
+                error = %e,
+                "Failed to update workflow undo metadata (cx path)"
+            );
+        }
+    }
+}
+
+/// Tick 185: dispatcher for record_workflow_terminal_action call sites.
+/// Takes `Option<&Cx>` — when Some routes through the cx-first variant,
+/// otherwise falls through to the legacy helper.
+#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
+pub(super) async fn record_workflow_terminal_action_maybe_cx(
+    cx: Option<&crate::cx::Cx>,
+    storage: &crate::storage::StorageHandle,
+    workflow_name: &str,
+    execution_id: &str,
+    pane_id: u64,
+    action_kind: &str,
+    result: &str,
+    reason: Option<&str>,
+    step_index: Option<usize>,
+    steps_executed: Option<usize>,
+    start_action_id: Option<i64>,
+) {
+    #[cfg(feature = "asupersync-runtime")]
+    if let Some(cx) = cx {
+        record_workflow_terminal_action_with_cx(
+            cx,
+            storage,
+            workflow_name,
+            execution_id,
+            pane_id,
+            action_kind,
+            result,
+            reason,
+            step_index,
+            steps_executed,
+            start_action_id,
+        )
+        .await;
+        return;
+    }
+    #[cfg(not(feature = "asupersync-runtime"))]
+    let _ = cx;
+    record_workflow_terminal_action(
+        storage,
+        workflow_name,
+        execution_id,
+        pane_id,
+        action_kind,
+        result,
+        reason,
+        step_index,
+        steps_executed,
+        start_action_id,
+    )
+    .await;
+}
+
 #[cfg(test)]
 mod tests {
     use super::*;
